meaning: vi.进行哲学探讨vt.使哲学化
examples: To philosophize is to learn how to die.
How can there be love if we are separated as you try to philosophize earlier.
Her speech caused him to philosophize that perhaps life is not so terrible after all.
Philosophize by the fire, in the house where Diderot and Marquise de Sevigne were guests.
No matter who you talk to about Chernobyl, they all want to philosophize.
